members.name: Health Touch Massage Center
members.description:
When the rhythms of life are flowing naturally, we don’t think much about them. But when we experience stress, lower back pain, stiff neck and shoulders, achy joints or injuries from an active life, we know that things aren’t as they should be. Massage therapy by Ada Boje of Health Touch Massage Center is an ideal way to help you recapture the natural rhythm of your life.

A Licensed Massage Therapist focusing on advanced bodywork, Ada will work with you in a calm, safe and open environment to bring relief to your stress, aches and pains. Ada will pace your therapy according to your specific needs and comfort level.

members.name: La Provence  - Raleigh Hills
members.description: La Provence (and its spin off, Petite Provence) are a series of local French bakeries and bistros founded in 1996 in Lake Oswego, Oregon. The business has since expanded, with multiple locations throughout Portland, including Alberta Street, Sandy Boulevard, Division Street, and Raleigh Hills, as well as spots in Beaverton, Hillsboro, Vancouver (WA), Lake Oswego, and The Dalles. The brand combines a classic bakery and bistro experience, offering breakfast, brunch, lunch—and in some locations, dinner. Menu ranges from flaky croissants, pains au chocolat, and custom cakes to savory pâtisseries, hearty entrees, and cocktails, beer, and wine.
members.address: 7424 SW Beaverton Hillsdale Highway, Portland, Oregon 97225

members.name: Lark and Fir Realty
members.description: Lark and Fir Realty is a woman-owned, independent residential real estate brokerage. Launched in 2018 in SW Portland, we include a diverse roster of about a dozen agents, and currently offer services in seven languages. We offer both seller and buyer representation, as well as pre-sale prep and staging services, and many excellent trade resources to share with our community. We hold quarterly events including live jazz, to stay connected with our neighbors. Based in Multnomah Village for 5+ years, we are moving to a larger home, with better parking for visitors in Raleigh Hills at Scholls Crossing in September of 2024. Fax: 503-703-3303.

members.description: Westside Wines is an independently owned fine wine shop located in Raleigh Hills. The vast majority of our wines are produced from organically or sustainably farmed grapes, so you can feel good about your purchase. Westside Wines offers five different quarterly wine clubs, starting at just $75. We also serve wine by the glass and small bites in the afternoons, making it a great place to both meet up with a friend and pick up a bottle of wine to take home.
